# opnsense_ddclient_settings (Data Source)

Reads Dynamic DNS daemon settings on OPNsense.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "opnsense_ddclient_settings" "daemon" {
  id = "ddclient-settings"
}

output "ddclient_backend" {
  value = data.opnsense_ddclient_settings.daemon.backend
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Synthetic singleton ID. Must be `ddclient-settings`.

### Read-Only

- `allow_ipv6` (Boolean) Whether IPv6 address updates are allowed.
- `backend` (String) Dynamic DNS backend.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the Dynamic DNS daemon is enabled.
- `interval` (Number) Daemon update interval in seconds (`daemon_delay`).
- `verbose` (Boolean) Whether verbose logging is enabled.
